case_title: KAO, HUI YUAN vs. WONG, SHAUN KENNETH et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, SHAUN KENNETH
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAO, HUI YUAN SERVED MAR-12-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, SHAUN KENNETH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAO, HUI YUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, SHAUN KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1500 30TH AVE #A, LEASE FORFEITED
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
ORDER OF EXAMINATION AS TO WONG, SHAUN KENNETH, CALENDAR OF JAN-08-1997, OFF CALENDAR, NOT SERVED
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAO, HUI YUAN
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $83.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $490.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, SHAUN KENNETH
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, SHAUN KENNETH OEX HEARING SET FOR JAN-08-1997 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 02
MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAO, HUI YUAN HEARING SET FOR MAR-11-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES, CALENDAR OF MAR-11-1997, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER DEFT SHALL PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION AND PAY $250.00 SANCTION WITHIN 15 DAYS. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, SHAUN KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 03/25/96 $1,584.38 RENT, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,092.38, LEASE FORFEITED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAO, HUI YUAN AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, SHAUN KENNETH DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT- CRC 522
